title: Why did the police have to push Jumbo off the main street?

meanings.usage: 指进行马戏表演的团体或场所
名词，表示赠送给他人的东西
医疗机构，用于治疗和护理病人
表示与某人一起做某事
表示向某人或某物走去
表示不愿意做某事或接受某事
指道路上的车辆和行人流动
表示有好运气或有利的情况
法律术语，指依法拘捕嫌疑人
表示某物的重量或测量重量
表示责任或义务，也可表示建议
表示用力量使物体移动
表示保护或看守的人员
表示过去的经历或表现的记载
表示给予许可或允许做某事

examples.en: The children dressed up as pirates for Halloween.
examples.zh: 孩子们在万圣节装扮成海盗。

examples.en: They set off for the mountains early in the morning.
examples.zh: 他们一大早就出发去山区了。

examples.en: The accident held up traffic for two hours.
examples.zh: 事故使交通堵塞了两个小时。

phrases.usage: 过去应该做但实际未做（虚拟语气）

examples.en: You ought to have told me the truth.

phrases.usage: 放过某人，不追究某人的责任

examples.en: The police let him off with a warning.
examples.zh: 警察只是警告了一下就放过了他。

examples.en: He has a good record at school.
This elephant weighs a few tons.
Go along this road and turn left at the second corner.
examples.zh: 沿着这条路走，在第二个拐角左转。

examples.en: He must be very tired after working all day.
examples.zh: 他工作了一整天肯定很累了。

grammar.title: 情态动词 ought to 的用法
grammar.definition: ought to 表示责任、义务或建议，其过去式 ought to have done 表示过去应该做而实际未做，带有责备或遗憾的意味
grammar.structure: ought to + 动词原形 / ought to have + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于表达应该做的事情，以及对过去未完成事情的遗憾

examples.en: You ought to be more careful.
He ought to have known that the police would never allow this.
examples.zh: 他早该知道警察是绝不会允许这种事的。

grammar.title: must 表示推测
grammar.definition: must 用于肯定句中表示对现在情况的推测，意为'一定、肯定'
grammar.usage: 用于对所见所闻进行有把握的推断

examples.en: Jumbo must weigh a few tons.
She must be at home now.

grammar.title: let someone off
grammar.definition: 让某人免受惩罚，放过某人
grammar.usage: 常用于警察或 authorities 对违法者网开一面的情况

examples.en: As he has a good record, we shall let him off this time.
examples.zh: 因为他有良好的记录，我们这次就放过他。

examples.en: The teacher let the student off with a warning.
examples.zh: 老师警告了一下就放过了那个学生。

sentencePatterns.pattern: ought to have + 过去分词

original.en: He should have known that the police would never allow this sort of thing.
original.zh: 他早该知道警察是绝不会允许这种事的。

imitations.en: You ought to have arrived earlier.
She ought to have finished her homework.

sentencePatterns.pattern: must + 动词原形（表示推测）

original.en: Jumbo must weigh a few tons.

imitations.en: This must cost a lot of money.

original.en: We shall let him off this time.

imitations.en: The judge let her off with a fine.
imitations.zh: 法官只罚了点款就放过了她。

imitations.en: They let us off the hook.

original.en: He was riding a baby elephant called Jumbo when a policeman approached.
original.zh: 正当他骑着一头叫Jumbo的小象时，一个警察走了过来。

imitations.en: She was reading a book when the phone rang.
imitations.zh: 她正在看书时电话响了。

imitations.en: I was walking home when it started to rain.
imitations.zh: 我正走回家时开始下雨了。
